feedback_text:
DIAGNOSIS: 6 failing sub-attributes (48.0 pts recoverable), 2 passing.

DO NOT CHANGE (these sections are passing):
  ✓ schema_correctness: 75% — keep unchanged
  ✓ schema_extensibility: 75% — keep unchanged

REQUIRED FIXES (ordered by point impact):

  FIX 1: schema_realworld.no_currency_handling (current: 0%, 8.0 pts at stake)
    Scorer's critique: ABSENT - Proper currency handling with ISO 4217 codes and cent-based amounts
    Measurement spec: Schema reflects real billing system patterns (Stripe-informed, not academic)
    Evidence found: "money": { "type": "object", "properties": { "amount": { "type": "integer", "description": "Amount in cents (smallest currency unit)", "minimum": 0 }, "currency": { "type": "string", "pattern": "^[A-Z]{3}$", "description": "ISO 4217 currency code" } }
    ⚠ This is a PENALTY violation — removing it recovers points

  FIX 2: schema_realworld.calculated_total_without_line_items (current: 0%, 8.0 pts at stake)
    Scorer's critique: ABSENT - Invoices include line_items array
    Measurement spec: Schema reflects real billing system patterns (Stripe-informed, not academic)
    Evidence found: "line_items": { "type": "array", "items": { "$ref": "#/definitions/invoice_line_item" } }
    ⚠ This is a PENALTY violation — removing it recovers points

  FIX 3: schema_realworld.no_idempotency (current: 0%, 8.0 pts at stake)
    Scorer's critique: ABSENT - Usage records include idempotency_key
    Measurement spec: Schema reflects real billing system patterns (Stripe-informed, not academic)
    Evidence found: "idempotency_key": { "type": "string", "maxLength": 255 }
    ⚠ This is a PENALTY violation — removing it recovers points

  FIX 4: schema_realworld.no_invoice_status_lifecycle (current: 0%, 8.0 pts at stake)
    Scorer's critique: ABSENT - Invoice status lifecycle properly modeled
    Measurement spec: Schema reflects real billing system patterns (Stripe-informed, not academic)
    Evidence found: "status": { "type": "string", "enum": ["draft", "open", "paid", "uncollectible", "void"] }
    ⚠ This is a PENALTY violation — removing it recovers points

  FIX 5: schema_realworld.naive_date_handling (current: 0%, 8.0 pts at stake)
    Scorer's critique: ABSENT - Proper ISO date-time format used throughout
    Measurement spec: Schema reflects real billing system patterns (Stripe-informed, not academic)
    Evidence found: "format": "date-time"
    ⚠ This is a PENALTY violation — removing it recovers points

  FIX 6: schema_realworld.single_currency_assumption (current: 0%, 8.0 pts at stake)
    Scorer's critique: ABSENT - Multi-currency support with ISO codes
    Measurement spec: Schema reflects real billing system patterns (Stripe-informed, not academic)
    Evidence found: "currency": { "type": "string", "pattern": "^[A-Z]{3}$", "description": "ISO 4217 currency code" }
